statement.en: Defluorination of perfluorooctanoic acid in alkaline DMSO-water: kinetics and carboncentered redox mechanism insights

proposer: Raphael Tur, Stéphanie Betelu, Stéfan Colombano et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The paper reports empirical kinetic and mechanistic findings (defluorination pathway, rate constants, redox intermediates) that are provisionally valid pending peer review and independent replication. The chemistry is well-established methodology, but the specific mechanistic claims (carbon-centered redox) require validation. Categorized as FLOWING rather than TRUE because: (1) publication date is 2026-04-25 (future/preprint status unclear), (2) mechanistic attribution to 'carbon-centered redox' is inference-dependent, (3) no indication of acceptance at established peer-reviewed venue provided.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: アルカリ性の深淵で、完全フッ素化された鎖は指数関数的に自らを忘却する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: パーフルオロ鎖の背骨は折れ、アルカリの刃が炭素の絆を奪い去る。
